caption:
Biting my lip as I adjusted the silk blouse, I caught the corner of Professor Marcus's gaze from across the lecture hall. The university air was thick with the scent of old paper and something far more intoxicating—his attention. Today, the tight-fitted blouse hugged my curves just right, the deep V-neck revealing a hint of the cleavage hidden beneath, while the pencil skirt did all the work to make my hips sway with every step. The professor's lecture was on classical literature, but my mind kept drifting to the way his eyes tracked the subtle movement of my body as I walked by his desk.

"Miss, come here," he called, his voice smooth like velvet. The class hushed, and a few students turned to watch. I smiled, feeling my heart race, and walked toward him, the fabric of my skirt whispering against my thighs. He held out a quill, but his eyes lingered on my neck, tracing a path of fire down my skin. The heat between us was palpable, a spark igniting in the quiet moment of the classroom. As I reached for the quill, he leaned in, close enough to feel his breath on my ear, whispering, "You make me forget what I was teaching today."

I turned back to my students, my cheeks flushed, my body humming with the electricity of that stolen glance. The game was on, and I knew that every time I walked past his desk, he'd be waiting to look a little longer, a little deeper. And oh, how I loved the thrill of it all. 🎀📚🔥
